items.summary_zh: 快手拆了可灵，字节拆豆包还会远么 搜狐网
items.summary_en: After Kuaishou spun off its AI video model Kling, the article discusses whether ByteDance will spin off its Doubao AI assistant. Spinning off could help focus resources and increase valuation.
items.why_zh: 快手分拆可灵可能引发行业效仿，字节跳动是否分拆豆包将影响AI助手市场的竞争格局。
items.why_en: Kuaishou's spin-off of Kling may set a precedent; whether ByteDance spins off Doubao will impact the AI assistant market competition.

items.title_zh: Meta计划今年下半年售出1000万台可穿戴设备
items.title_en: Meta Plans to Sell 10 Million Wearable Devices in H2 2025
items.summary_zh: 据报道，Meta计��通过推出新品、拓展销售市场等举措在今年下半年售出1000万台可穿戴设备，目标年底实现可穿戴设备月活跃用户达680万人。另外，Meta计划明年启动一款人工智能吊坠的测试工作。（界面新闻）
items.summary_en: Meta aims to sell 10 million wearable devices in H2 2025, targeting 6.8 million monthly active users by year-end. It also plans to test an AI pendant next year.
items.why_zh: Meta的可穿戴设备销售目标显示其硬件野心，AI吊坠的测试则预示AI硬件新形态，对消费电子和AI行业有重要影响。
items.why_en: Meta's ambitious wearable sales target and AI pendant testing signal its hardware push and new AI form factors, impacting consumer electronics and AI.

items.title_zh: 广东汕头实现日均百亿词元“出海” 算力服务加速迈向全球
items.title_en: Shantou, Guangdong Achieves Daily Tens of Billions of Tokens 'Going Global', Computing Power Services Accelerate Global Expansion
items.summary_zh: 广东汕头实现日均百亿词元“出海” 算力服务加速迈向全球 chinanews.com.cn
items.summary_en: Shantou, Guangdong, now processes tens of billions of tokens daily for overseas clients, showcasing China's computing power services going global. This accelerates the international expansion of Chinese AI infrastructure.
items.why_zh: 汕头算力服务“出海”是中国AI基础设施全球化的缩影，对提升中国在全球AI产业链中的地位具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Shantou's computing power export is a microcosm of China's AI infrastructure globalization, crucial for enhancing China's position in the global AI industry chain.

items.title_zh: 新一代全域智能操作系统麒麟 100 正式发布：打通移动与桌面生态，支持双系统无感切换
items.title_en: Kylin 100 Smart OS Released: Bridges Mobile and Desktop Ecosystems with Seamless Dual-System Switching
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 30 日消息，在 5 月 28 日至 31 日于天津举办的 2026 世界智能产业博览会上，麒麟软件正式发布了全新一代全域智能操作系统 —— 麒麟 100 智联操作系统，面向政企办公、生活娱乐、多设备协同等全场景。 IT之家从官方获悉，该系统采用自主可信内核加轻量级虚拟化技术，配备“平行视界”交互模式与增强型多窗口管理能力，深度打通移动生态与桌面生态，实现双系统并行运行、无感切换、数据互通与剪贴板实时共享，使大屏设备能流畅运行海量移动应用。 在多端互联方面，麒麟 100 全面适配智能手机、平板电脑、笔记本电脑及各类通信终端，支持多设备无线互联、硬件资源按需共享与云端统一同步，实现“一机双屏双系统”的无缝协同体验，用户数据与个性化设置可在不同终端间自动同步、即时生效。 安全架构上，系统构建了涵盖全栈国密、分层隔离与可信子系统三重防护体系，从芯片底层到应用层实施物理级强隔离，敏感权限用完即撤，文件与应用数据全程加密存储、独立隔离，达到“改不了、偷不走、强隔离”的高安全等级，全面适配国家网络与信息安全要求。 智能化方面，麒麟 100 深度优化端侧 AI 引擎，支持大模型智能路由调度、本地记忆体管理及多智能体协同推理，并原生集成离线语音输入、智能相册识别、实时语音翻译等 AI 功能。 ▲ 原生海量应用 ▲ 双系统一键切换，或打开网信应用进入另一系统 ▲ 以“微信读书”为例…
items.summary_en: Kylin Software unveiled the Kylin 100 Smart OS at the 2026 World Intelligent Industry Expo. The system integrates mobile and desktop ecosystems, supports dual-system parallel operation with seamless switching, and enables multi-device interconnection. It features enhanced security with full-stack national cryptography and intelligent capabilities including on-device AI engine and large model scheduling.
items.why_zh: 该操作系统标志着国产操作系统在跨生态融合与端侧AI集成方面的重要突破，对政企办公和多设备协同场景具有深远影响。
items.why_en: This OS marks a significant breakthrough in cross-ecosystem integration and on-device AI for domestic operating systems, with profound implications for government and enterprise productivity and multi-device collaboration.

items.title_zh: 一手实测，Opus 4.8 Vs ChatGPT 5.5 Vs Kimi 2.6 ，谁最可用？
items.title_en: Hands-on Test: Opus 4.8 vs ChatGPT 5.5 vs Kimi 2.6 – Which is Most Usable?
items.summary_zh: 一手实测，Opus 4.8 Vs ChatGPT 5.5 Vs Kimi 2.6 ，谁最可用？ 搜狐网
items.summary_en: A hands-on test comparing Opus 4.8, ChatGPT 5.5, and Kimi 2.6 was published on Sohu. The article evaluates the usability of these three AI models through practical experience, though specific results are not yet disclosed.
items.why_zh: 该对比测试为用户选择AI助手提供了直接参考，反映了当前主流模型在可用性上的竞争态势。
items.why_en: This comparison provides direct reference for users choosing AI assistants, reflecting the competitive landscape of mainstream models in terms of usability.

items.title_zh: 极致炒作！智谱估值高到离谱，股民吃个饭天塌了，徐新浮盈700倍
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Valuation Allegedly Overhyped, Xu Xin's 700x Gain Sparks Controversy
items.summary_zh: 极致炒作！智谱估值高到离谱，股民吃个饭天塌了，徐新浮盈700倍 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Sina Finance reported that Zhipu AI's valuation is allegedly extremely overhyped, with investor Xu Xin's paper gain reaching 700 times. The report raises concerns about potential valuation bubbles in the AI investment sector.
items.why_zh: 该事件揭示了AI初创公司估值泡沫的风险，对投资者和行业监管具有警示意义。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the risk of valuation bubbles in AI startups, serving as a warning for investors and industry regulators.
